description: Layered eval cases for codex-controlled routing, anti-regression, Micro-UI, and neighboring skill non-stealing behavior.

cases.prompt: Please modify this repo, but first define the scope boundary, wait for my checkpoint approval, and do not auto-continue.
cases.reason: Explicit checkpointed controlled collaboration should recall codex-controlled.

cases.prompt: Before implementing this runner change, check whether the working tree, generated artifacts, and truth sources are clean.
cases.reason: Project Hygiene Gate is a codex-controlled control-plane responsibility.

cases.prompt: Show this checkpoint as a structured JSON visual state card with explicit approval actions, but do not proceed until I approve.
cases.reason: Micro-UI checkpoint state belongs to codex-controlled.

cases.prompt: Use TDD if appropriate, but if I do not understand the plan, pause execution and explain before continuing.
cases.reason: Conflict between Superpowers execution and user understanding should route to codex-controlled.
Simple conceptual Q&A should not force codex-controlled unless explicit control, checkpoint, or coaching is requested.

cases.prompt: Use test-driven development to implement this small parser behavior.
cases.reason: Pure TDD request should not be stolen by codex-controlled unless checkpoint/control-plane constraints are present.

cases.prompt: The unit test fails with this stack trace. Please systematically debug the root cause.
cases.reason: Pure debugging request should route to debugging skill unless codex-controlled boundaries/checkpoints are requested.

cases.prompt: All tests pass. Help me finish this development branch and prepare a PR.
cases.reason: Pure finishing request should route to finishing skill unless control-plane approval constraints are requested.

cases.prompt: I do not understand why this schema exists. Explain it in plain language and with a terms table.
cases.reason: Explanation-only request should not be stolen by the top-level orchestrator if the layered explanation skill is directly applicable.

cases.prompt: Teach me how to read this verification dashboard and decide if it actually passed.
cases.reason: Teaching verification interpretation should prefer Coach Mode unless wider control workflow is requested.

cases.prompt: Run the verification command if available; if the tool is unavailable, explain the limitation and do not claim completion.
cases.reason: Environment/tool availability issue should preserve evidence-before-completion behavior.
